title: Say So
lyrics: Day to night to morning, keep with me in the moment
I'd let you had I know it, why don't you say so?
Didn't even notice, no punches there to roll with
You got to keep me focused, you want it, say so
Day and night till morning, keep with me in the moment
I'll let you had I known it
why don't you say so?
Didn't even notice, no punches there to roll with
You got to keep me focused, you want it, say so
It's been a long time since you (Fell in love)
You ain't coming out your shell, you really ain't been yourself
Tell me what should i do
(Tell my lies)
But luckily I'm good at reading,
I wanna fuck him but he won't stop chasin'
And we can dance all day around it
If you front then I'll be bouncin'
If you want it scream and shout it, bae~
But fuck that if you try
Didn't have to know me, keep with me in the moment
I'll get you hot and moaning, why don't you say so?
Didn't even notice, no punches there to roll with
You got to keep me focused, you want it, say so

I get you hot and moaning, why don't you say so?
Didn't even notice, no punches there to roll with

Let me check my chest, my breath right quick

He ain't never seen her in a dress like this

Prolly why I got him quiet on the set like zip
Like it. love it. need it bad.

Knowing, you want, all this,
Im'ma squeeze you til' you dry
All of them bitches hating I have you with me
All of my niggas saying you mad committed

All of that body I need ass and titties

I get you hot and moaning, why don't you say so?
Didn't even notice, no punches there to roll with
